tool.required_bundle_shape: canonical SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE with approved_spec_inputs and proposed_canonical_lock_fields

compatibility_notes: P2-SPEC-03 readiness bundle is not itself accepted by tooling/create_spec_lock.py because it is a candidate readiness bundle, not the canonical tool input bundle.
This Candidate provides SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json in the canonical shape accepted by tooling/create_spec_lock.py.
P2 review decisions expose review_id rather than decision_id; review_decision_id is omitted from approved_spec_inputs so the tool validates APPROVED state and subject_hash binding only.
remaining_blocker_before_real_lock_write: Explicit user request to create P2_SPEC_LOCK is still required; output path must remain absent.

custom_compensating_checks.reason: P2 review decisions use review_id while create_spec_lock.py only optionally checks decision_id.
custom_compensating_checks.coverage: VALIDATION_EVIDENCE includes P2_SPEC_LOCK_REVIEW_ID_BINDING to assert review_id, review file hash, and subject hash for each approved input.

custom_compensating_checks.reason: A successful dry-run exit code alone is too thin for review.
custom_compensating_checks.coverage: VALIDATION_EVIDENCE includes P2_SPEC_LOCK_DRY_RUN_OBJECT_BINDING to parse dry-run JSON and assert root, review file root, schema, source candidate, and output path preflight.
